scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,yellow "vite" "cd server && node src/index.js"
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx knex migrate:latest --knexfile knexfile.js
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx knex seed:run --knexfile knexfile.js
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx knex migrate:latest --knexfile knexfile.js && npx knex seed:run --knexfile knexfile.js
